query: Coach Tactic Board Soccer app interface screenshot

results.caption: The image displays the text "Can A Coaching Board App Replace Your Whiteboard?" alongside a tablet and a whiteboard.
A digital soccer tactical board displays player positions, a ball, and a drawing tools menu.
A digital soccer field interface with toolbar options: TAKE BALL, PLAYER MOVEMENT, CONES, FREE LINE, DELETE ALL.
A 13.7-inch soccer tactical board with a field diagram, numbered markers, and dimensions labeled.
